__inputs.name: DS_SQLITE
__inputs.label: Inventory SQLite
__inputs.description: frser-sqlite-datasource pointed read-only at the inventory WAL DB

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT d.name AS Printer, s.gcode_state AS State, s.mc_percent AS 'Progress %', s.remaining_min AS 'Remaining (min)', s.nozzle_temp AS 'Nozzle C', s.bed_temp AS 'Bed C', s.subtask_name AS Job, s.updated_at AS Updated FROM inventory_printerstate s JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = s.device_id WHERE d.enabled = 1 ORDER BY d.name;
targets.queryText: SELECT d.name AS Printer, s.gcode_state AS State, s.mc_percent AS 'Progress %', s.remaining_min AS 'Remaining (min)', s.nozzle_temp AS 'Nozzle C', s.bed_temp AS 'Bed C', s.subtask_name AS Job, s.updated_at AS Updated FROM inventory_printerstate s JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = s.device_id WHERE d.enabled = 1 ORDER BY d.name;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT d.name || ' AMS' || u.ams_index AS metric, u.humidity AS value FROM inventory_amsunitstate u JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = u.device_id WHERE u.humidity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.name, u.ams_index;
targets.queryText: SELECT d.name || ' AMS' || u.ams_index AS metric, u.humidity AS value FROM inventory_amsunitstate u JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = u.device_id WHERE u.humidity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.name, u.ams_index;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT d.name || ' AMS' || c.ams_index || '/T' || c.tray_index || CASE WHEN c.tray_type != '' THEN ' (' || c.tray_type || ')' ELSE '' END AS metric, c.remain_pct AS value FROM inventory_amschannelstate c JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = c.device_id WHERE c.remain_pct >= 0 ORDER BY d.name, c.ams_index, c.tray_index;
targets.queryText: SELECT d.name || ' AMS' || c.ams_index || '/T' || c.tray_index || CASE WHEN c.tray_type != '' THEN ' (' || c.tray_type || ')' ELSE '' END AS metric, c.remain_pct AS value FROM inventory_amschannelstate c JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = c.device_id WHERE c.remain_pct >= 0 ORDER BY d.name, c.ams_index, c.tray_index;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', t.ts) * 1000 AS time, d.name AS metric, t.mc_percent AS value FROM inventory_telemetrysample t JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = t.device_id WHERE t.ts >= datetime('now', '-24 hours') ORDER BY t.ts;
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', t.ts) * 1000 AS time, d.name AS metric, t.mc_percent AS value FROM inventory_telemetrysample t JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = t.device_id WHERE t.ts >= datetime('now', '-24 hours') ORDER BY t.ts;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', t.ts) * 1000 AS time, d.name || ' nozzle' AS metric, t.nozzle_temp AS value FROM inventory_telemetrysample t JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = t.device_id WHERE t.ts >= datetime('now', '-24 hours') AND t.nozzle_temp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.ts;
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', t.ts) * 1000 AS time, d.name || ' nozzle' AS metric, t.nozzle_temp AS value FROM inventory_telemetrysample t JOIN inventory_printerdevice d ON d.id = t.device_id WHERE t.ts >= datetime('now', '-24 hours') AND t.nozzle_temp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.ts;
